name: tapu-lele
flavor_texts: This guardian deity of Akala is guilelessly cruel. The fragrant aroma of flowers is the source of its energy.
As it flutters about, it scatters its strangely glowing scales. Touching them is said to restore good health on the spot.
It heals the wounds of people and Pokémon by sprinkling them with its sparkling scales. This guardian deity is worshiped on Akala.
Although called a guardian deity, Tapu Lele is devoid of guilt about its cruel disposition and can be described as nature incarnate.
text: Tapu-lele is the Land Spirit Pokémon. It is a psychic and fairy-type Pokémon. Abilities: psychic-surge, telepathy (hidden). Base stats — HP: 70, Attack: 85, Defense: 75, Sp. Atk: 130, Sp. Def: 115, Speed: 95. Evolution line: tapu-lele. Lore: This guardian deity of Akala is guilelessly cruel. The fragrant aroma of flowers is the source of its energy. As it flutters about, it scatters its strangely glowing scales. Touching them is said to restore good health on the spot. It heals the wounds of people and Pokémon by sprinkling them with its sparkling scales. This guardian deity is worshiped on Akala. Although called a guardian deity, Tapu Lele is devoid of guilt about its cruel disposition and can be described as nature incarnate.
